ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Salted skinless herring fillets 83% (atlantic herring, (clupea harengus) fillets,salt,dextrose,flavour enhancer (monosodium glutamate), acidity regulators (glucono delta-factone,citric acid, tartaric acid), preservatives(sodium benzoate,potassium sorbate)),canola oil 17%.
